Vietnamese: Kính (Chữ nhật)
Kính (Windsor)
Kính (Tròn)
Kính râm (Windsor)
Kính râm (Kích thước lớn)
Kính râm (Browline)
Vẽ mặt
Bộ Nữ Bá tước
Khuyên tai Gấu dễ thương
Màu tóc (Vàng)
Màu tóc (Xanh)
Mũ Gà
Bộ Sói
Bộ Mèo
Mũ Gấu

English: Saddler... The leader of the cult.
Vietnamese: Saddler... Thủ lĩnh của giáo phái.
Tôi nghĩ tôi sẽ từ chối.
Hôi thối.

English: Burning flesh... I thought I'd left that life behind.
Vietnamese: Thịt cháy xém... Tôi tưởng mình đã bỏ lại quá khứ đó đằng sau.

English: At least their holy book looks interesting.
Vietnamese: Ít nhất quyển thánh kinh của chúng trông cũng thú vị.
Bay đi, cục cưng của ta.
Luis làm trò này sao?
Chỗ này cần dọn dẹp.

English: I don't need it that bad.
Vietnamese: Tôi không cần nó đến mức đó.

English: Hm, a raccoon. Guess this is fate.
Vietnamese: Hm, một con gấu mèo. Chắc đây là số phận.

English: That's where I need to go.
Vietnamese: Đó là nơi tôi cần đến.

English: Stick to the high ground. You have the means.
Vietnamese: Giữ vị trí trên cao. Cậu có cách.

English: That looks dangerous. Better tread carefully.
Vietnamese: Cái đó trông nguy hiểm. Cẩn thận mới được.
Không biết cái đó là gì nhỉ.

English: A radio tower. That's where I need to go.
Vietnamese: Một tháp radio. Đó là nơi tôi cần đến.

English: The area's well guarded. I need to be careful.
Vietnamese: Khu vực này canh gác nghiêm ngặt. Tôi phải cẩn thận.

English: Just what I was looking for.
Vietnamese: Đúng thứ tôi đang tìm.

English: And here we go. This way.
Vietnamese: Được rồi, đi theo hướng này.
Có gần không?
Không hẳn. Nhưng an toàn.

English: No Amber, no deal. You know the terms.
Vietnamese: Không có Hổ Phách, thì không giao dịch. Ngươi biết điều kiện rồi.

English:
We're good. We're good.
What do you want with it anyway?
Vietnamese:
Được rồi, ổn cả.
Nhưng rốt cuộc ngươi muốn nó để làm gì?
Tôi chưa biết...chưa rõ.
Á, đôi mắt tôi... Cái gì—?

English: Is this all in my head?
Vietnamese: Tất cả chỉ là ảo giác trong đầu tôi sao?
Tìm thấy rồi.
Đi nhầm hướng rồi.
Và đừng bao giờ quay lại.

English:
And don't forget your mission: the Amber.
Nothing else matters.
Vietnamese:
Đừng quên nhiệm vụ: Hổ Phách.
Không gì quan trọng bằng nó.

English: Wrap this little tour up and bring it to me.
Vietnamese: Kết thúc chuyến tham quan nhỏ này, mang nó đến cho ta.

English: Understood. But maybe a little sightseeing first?
Vietnamese: Hiểu rồi. Nhưng có lẽ mình nên dạo một vòng trước?

English:
Things are heating up.
I'll need to disable the catapults.
Vietnamese:
Tình hình đang căng thẳng đây.
Tôi phải vô hiệu hóa những chiếc máy ném đá.
Cái này là vừa ý rồi.
Đúng là xong việc.

English: A little touch and go there for a moment.
Vietnamese: Lúc nãy gần như nguy hiểm lắm.
Chỉ là công việc.
Gần ra khỏi đây rồi.
Gần tới nhà thờ rồi.
Chào đón nhiệt tình quá!

English: Hm, this isn't the way to the church.
Vietnamese: Hm,这条路 không phải là đường tới nhà thờ.
Đường này có vẻ hứa hẹn.
Tôi phải nhanh lên.
Đây rồi—nhà thờ.
Phải biết rồi, tên này toàn gây rắc rối.

English: I bet Leon's here to save her.
Vietnamese: Chắc Leon đến đây để cứu cô ấy.

English:
Hurry on to the church now.
You don't want to be late.
Vietnamese:
Nhanh lên, đến nhà thờ ngay.
Đừng để trễ.

English:
They're waiting for the gate to open.
How obedient.
Vietnamese:
Chúng đang đợi cổng mở.
Nghe có vẻ ngoan ngoãn đấy.

English: Won't let me go so easily, huh?
Vietnamese: Chẳng dễ dàng để tha cho tao, hả?
Sương mù. Nó đang dày lên.
Có vẻ là hiệu quả đấy.

English: Not fond of that, are we?
Vietnamese: Không thích cái đó à?

English: OK, now for the village chief's house.
Vietnamese: Được rồi, giờ đến nhà trưởng làng.
Chắc ngay phía trước.
Phải lục soát căn nhà.

English: Hope there's a lead on Luis here.
Vietnamese: Hy vọng tìm được manh mối về Luis ở đây.
Tao không thể ra đi tay trắng.
Tao không thể ra đi tay trắng.
Tao không thể ra đi tay trắng.
Chúng ta tìm được gì đây?

English: I bet they took him here.
Vietnamese: Chắc chúng đã đưa anh ta đến đây.
Chuyện này chẳng ăn thua gì.

English: I'm just wasting bullets at this point.
Vietnamese: Giờ tớ chỉ đang phí đạn thôi.
Hmph.
Không có lối thoát.
Đủ rồi!
Vẫn đang truy sát tớ à?

English: Looks like I gave them the slip.
Vietnamese: Có vẻ tớ đã lừa được chúng.
Tìm được cái gì đó...
Chắc là của tên to xác.
Hy vọng hắn ở dưới này.
Không một bóng người.
Những thứ này thuộc về Luis.
Đây là tần số của hắn sao?
Chẳng tốt lành gì...
Lại là vận xui của tớ.

English: My, you are a popular one, Luis.
Vietnamese: Ôi, cậu thật là nổi tiếng đấy, Luis.
Cái quái gì vậy?
Chết tiệt!
Đúng là ăn đòn rồi.

English: How many more can you take?
Vietnamese: Cậu còn chịu được bao nhiêu nữa?

English: Now look at the mess you've made.
Vietnamese: Xem cái đống hỗn độn cậu gây ra đi.
Chà.

English: Only a matter of time before it wrecks the place.
Vietnamese: Chỉ là vấn đề thời gian trước khi nó phá nát cả nơi này.
Tôi sẽ báo cho Leon biết.

English: Hola. Luis here. You guys still around?
Vietnamese: Hola. Luis đây. Các cậu còn ở đó không?

English:
Well, I wanted to go home, but Ashley
just had to see this castle first.
Vietnamese:
Thực ra tôi muốn về nhà ngay, nhưng Ashley
nhất định phải xem lâu đài này trước.

English: Perfect, because I have a present I want to give you.
Vietnamese: Tuyệt vời, vì tôi có một món quà muốn tặng cậu.

English:
Medicine that will help to suppress
the progress of your...problem.
Vietnamese: Thuốc giúp kìm hãm sự tiến triển của...vấn đề của cậu.
Chúng ta đi đâu bây giờ?

English:
Let's see... Come to the courtyard inside
of the castle. We can meet up there. ¡Ciao!
Vietnamese: Để xem nào...Hãy đến sân trong lâu đài. Chúng ta sẽ gặp nhau ở đó. ¡Ciao!

English: Sorry to keep you waiting. Shall we?
Vietnamese: Xin lỗi vì để bạn đợi. Chúng ta đi nào?
Phụ nữ đi trước.
Lịch sự quá nhỉ.

English:
There's a hidden laboratory downstairs.
My stuff should be there.
Vietnamese:
Có một phòng thí nghiệm ẩn ở tầng dưới.
Đồ của tôi chắc ở đó.
Cả thuốc ức chế nữa?

English: Hey, who are you working for anyway?
Vietnamese: Này, rốt cuộc cô đang làm việc cho ai vậy?

English: You're better off not knowing. Trust me.
Vietnamese: Cô đừng biết thì tốt hơn. Tin tôi đi.

English:
Well, you can work for the devil for all I care.
As long as you get me out of here...
Vietnamese: Tùy cô, cứ làm việc cho quỷ cũng được, miễn là cô đưa tôi ra khỏi đây...

English: What would I do without you, Ada?
Vietnamese: Tôi sẽ làm gì nếu thiếu cô, Ada?
Làm mồi cho ký sinh trùng?
Đi đường này.
¡Mierda! Ada, chúng nó đến rồi!
Dĩ nhiên rồi.
Cảm ơn.
Hm? Có gì đang cháy hả?
Chắc ta sẽ biết ngay.
Anh nói thật đấy?

English: Better get him out of there.
Vietnamese: Nhanh đưa anh ấy ra ngoài đi.
Luis! Quay lại đây!
Đừng hít khói!

English: We can go back up this way.
Vietnamese: Ta có thể quay lên theo đường này.

English: Then figure out our next move.
Vietnamese: Rồi tính tiếp bước kế tiếp.
Này, tao sẽ mở khóa— Hả?
Chìa khóa đâu rồi?

English: Shit! I must have dropped it.
Vietnamese: Đồ khốn! Tớ chắc đã làm rơi mất.

English: This is where we part. Good luck.
Vietnamese: Đến đây là chia tay. Chúc may mắn.
Cậu cũng vậy.
Được, đầu tiên... cái xưởng đóng sách.
Rắc rối thật.

English: The first ingredient should be in this room.
Vietnamese: Nguyên liệu đầu tiên phải ở trong phòng này.
Chắc hẳn đó là mực.
Hẹn gặp lại, Leon.
Âm thanh đó...

English:
That's right. I still have some unfinished
business to take care of.
Vietnamese:
Đúng vậy. Tôi vẫn còn vài việc dở dang
phải giải quyết.

English:
The gate and gong have the same symbol...
Seems simple enough.
Vietnamese:
Cổng và chuông có cùng biểu tượng...
Nghe thì đơn giản thôi.

English: I've got a bad feeling about this.
Vietnamese: Tôi có cảm giác không lành về chuyện này.

English: Who comes up with these things?
Vietnamese: Ai mà nghĩ ra những thứ quái quỷ này?

English: Need to find a way out!
Vietnamese: Phải tìm đường thoát ra!

English: OK, now for the second ingredient.
Vietnamese: Được, giờ đến nguyên liệu thứ hai.
Có vẻ như chỗ này cần đặt thứ gì đó.
Bẫy.

English: Bottle's the same color as the gate.
Vietnamese: Chai này cùng màu với cổng.

English: I think I know what's coming...
Vietnamese: Tôi đoán là mình biết chuyện gì sắp xảy ra...
Đúng như dự đoán.
Được, còn lại một nguyên liệu nữa.

English: Couldn't just let me through, could you.
Vietnamese: Chẳng thể cứ để tôi đi qua, phải không?
Tìm thấy rồi.
Hóa ra cậu ở đây.
Quay lại đây ngay.
Cuối cùng rồi. May quá, xong việc.
Hừ. Thú vị nhỉ.

English: The last ingredient's not far now.
Vietnamese: Nguyên liệu cuối cùng chẳng còn xa nữa.
Tôi nên kiểm tra phía dưới.

English: This must be the collection room.
Vietnamese: Chắc chắn đây là phòng sưu tập.
Biết rồi.
Bướm xanh.
Luis đang giữ Hổ Phách...
Tôi phải tìm đến anh ấy.

English: Luis's footprints... Must have gone this way.
Vietnamese: Dấu chân của Luis... Chắc chắn đã đi theo hướng này.
Xuống thôi.

English: He really knows his way around this place.
A nest? Hope it's not a sign of things to come.
That should take care of the water...I hope.
Ugh... Not exactly what I expected.
I'm sorry. I'm not going to make it.
I'll send you my files. They should help...
The Amber, Luis. Where is it?
Thank you for the chance to do good again.
Like I said, I'm just your good ol' Samaritan.
How about you help Leon when I'm gone, eh?
Speaking of, ugh, sounds like he needs me.
How'd he get over there so fast?
I've got a ways to go.

Should be just up ahead.
But getting through won't be easy.
I need to open this to get to the comms facility.
Doesn't look like I can get through.
There. Should be able to get out now.
Not exactly covert, but it'll have to do.
Rockets first, then I can take care of the rest.
Excuse me. Can I see your ticket?
It's just one thing after another today.
Need to find the main terminal.

Something tells me this
isn't just a comms facility.
I'm just wasting bullets at this point.
If that thing catches me, I'm done for.
I don't have time for this.
This is where we say goodbye.

Guess my new friend was the
result of some experiment.
Now, how to connect the device...

Not long until the bombs on this
island start popping off.
Time to end this. Hold on, Leon.
Too far... Need to get a little closer.
You will be tried and found wanting!
Behold the power of the Holy Body!
What could you possibly hope to accomplish?
Fret not, for your suffering shall soon be over.

You leave me little choice.
The blasphemous unwilling to repent...
shall be put to the whip!
You! You need to be punished...
and taught to walk the path of righteousness!

Wayward lamb, servant of the heretic wolf.
This will be your trial and tribulation.
Tribulation? You're the one in for a world of hurt.
No! The glory of las plagas is eternal!
The avarice of the wicked shall not be abided.
There is no place for you in our paradise.

But you may yet return to us
one who has been lost...
You cannot deceive me! I know what you seek.

You wish to claim the power
of the Holy Body for yourself!

Yet I'm afraid such efforts are made in vain.
For only the zealous shall be rewarded.

While heretics such as yourself
shall fertilize the soil.

Ooh, that beauty shoots arrows tipped with explosives.
You'll get quite the fireworks display, heheheh.

Take a look at that drum magazine...
You can spray and pray in style with that!

Well now, let's make our first time
doing business a memorable one.

That shorty's very easy to handle.
It'll be perfect for you.

I can hardly contain myself!
You're really gonna do it, stranger!
Gun will look great with that attached.

Caught myself a big one.
How long had it been living down here?
I'm seeing quite the crowd here.
Hm, I wonder what has them so riled up?
Couldn't have picked a worse time.

Consider the village infected.
Complete local saturation.
I've read the file. I'll see what I can do.

We just lost Luis's signal somewhere
in the vicinity of the forest.

He has a house there.
Could be worth taking a look?
I'll see what I can find from my end.
Haha, I knew you'd find me!
Are you about ready to hand over the Amber?

There's a big house just outside the village
past the windmill. You know it?
Then I'll meet you here. I'll be waiting!
I've been waiting and, uh, you're still coming, right?
Yes, just had some business to attend to.
Got it. See you soon. Ciao.

The last one should be in a room
accessible from the castle wall.
You bring them all to the top of the wall...

Oh, and here's some more info I've recovered
about that old rock. Sending it now.
Krauser has possession of the Amber.
I'll have it back before long.

See that you do. The mission
must proceed as planned.
A bad guy...Krauser...just stole the Amber!

Ada, come in. There's a lab where we can remove the parasites.
Had a crazy hunch that you'd know where it is.

Their most important facilities are housed in
their sanctuary at the top of the mountain.
Happy to help. Now you owe me.
(In Spanish) Looks like the next dance is mine, brother.
That's no way to finish a dance.

Excellent timing, Ada. You know
how I feel about being tied up.

And yes. Many thanks. You see, those annoying
monks took everything from me.

Ohoho, no. Cleverly hidden,
just before they grabbed me.

We've got company. They're looking for us.
But we're taking the high road, got it?
Fetch the Amber. We'll meet up later.
No! Sorry, what kind of a man leaves a lady— Whoa!

Then we meet at the church!
Let's not make it a funeral, eh?
Not bad. But not nearly good enough.

Control, come in. Luis hid the Amber,
but I've sent him to retrieve it.
We ran into some unexpected trouble.
And? What will you do about it?
Luis is already en route to the church.
I'm tracking him every step of the way.
Very well. Then I suggest you hurry.
Copy. Just need to confirm my route first.
Heading out to get a visual of the area.

So, he wants me to retrieve the Amber.
An object of ill omen.
What terrible actions will be done in its name?
And who will pay its dark cost?
Because in this world, someone always pays.
Best not to ask who or why.
I understood that. Made my peace with it.

Until that one night in Raccoon City
...changed everything.

I'm heading to meet Luis at
the rendezvous point now.

I'm seeing increased movement
from Los Iluminados.
Hey, stranger. So what're ya buyin'?

You've picked quite the place
to set up shop, "stranger."
Aye, and look what it brought me!
So kind of you to keep our friends busy.
Let's see if we can find another route to the church.
Sounds like he could use a little help.
Don't worry, Leon. First time's free.
Your blood has accepted the Gift.
Sorry, Luis. I might be a while.
Wesker. To what do I owe this pleasure?
Find Luis. Fetch me the Amber.
I should probably thank you for this room.
I'm not here to babysit you.
See that you remain an asset—and not a liability.
I have absolutely no use for your incompetence.
Sorry, big guy. Can't let you go that way.
I do. The kind you like.
Unfortunately, it's not on me at the moment.

And you really should be telling
me what a good job I did.

Busted my ass and managed to
hide it right before I got caught.
Which is why I'm still alive!

The deal was we get you out of here
when you deliver the Amber.
Such a stickler for details, huh Ada?
I'll go get it now. How about that?
And I do have something else I need to get too.
You probably didn't plan on coming back here, eh?
I must do before I can recover the Amber.
This is not a negotiation, Luis.
So choose your next words carefully.
Listen, there's someone who needs my help.
And you know me—always the good Samaritan!
Yes! Exactly! Leon, and that young woman...
It slows the infection. And I know it works...
I used it...on myself. So I—
And why does this matter to me?
It's what I researched for all these years, Ada.
And I see the symptoms already showing in your eyes.
You must already feel the effects, eh?

The medicine will stop them for a time.
Just trust me.
You have a lot to gain...and nothing to lose!
OK. But this is your last chance.
We do this first and then the Amber.
We can't let the medicine be destroyed!

If you're trying to kill yourself, can you
do it after you've delivered the Amber?
It's all gone... Burnt to nothing.
Why is this so important to you?
There are things I must set right.
It's all over—and I can't help them anymore.
You know how. Just do it.
The ingredients are all here. In the castle.
but I can still get you your Amber.

OK. Won't be my finest effort
—but it might just work.

and just maybe, I can make
a new batch of medicine.
You go, find them, and I will go grab the Amber.
You can stop right there, Leon.
Wouldn't make me use this, would you?

Well after six years, that
is one hell of a greeting...

Try using knives next time.
Better for close encounters.
So who are you working for this time?
You know I don't work and tell.
Maybe you'll live to meet me again.

And then I might get you that
"greeting" you were looking for.
You think I'm gonna give up that easy?

How about we continue this
discussion another time?
So, what's become of the Amber?
But my little helper is creating quite the commotion.
Everything will work out just fine.
As long as you can keep your dog under control.
But don't come crying to me if you get bit.
Assuming you haven't, I've got a tip for you.

Seems like something big is about
to go down in the throne room.
Good, and I got exactly what you want.
The parasite's reacting to the Amber.
That looks like something Wesker would want.
This will knock out the parasite...
Just remember, it's not a cure.

We still need to find a way
to get that thing out of you.
It should be working by now!

Once the parasite is sedated, you
can give me back that damn stone.
I can't leave you here! Not like this!
You got another promise to keep.
All right. But you come find me...
I need to put that thing down.

Can't stand the clingy type.
Time to end this for good.
Luis. The goodbye's gonna have to wait.
Leon. There's only time to say this once, so listen up.
They took your friend to the top of the clock tower.

If you hurry, you might get there
before she turns into one of them.

Ah, so you aren't heartless after all.
I guess I should be...thankful?

To have been bestowed with Lord
Saddler's grace, and yet fail to—
Just keep him busy a little longer.
You look like you've got something to say.
but I don't think I'll get a straight answer.
You know, after the incident. The world changed.
You try to save one person; a hundred others die.
You haven't changed. You just think you have.
Or are you just trying to use me again?

Whose blood are you here for this time?
Mine or Saddler's?
Of course, you're free to refuse.
You think that gun's gonna be enough?
OK. I'll do it—but it'll cost you extra.
Wise decision. I'll send you the new coordinates.
And remember, I do not like—
You brought the medicine just in time.
He was worried about you...until the end.
Come on. We don't have much time.
Let's get rid of these things.
I'm at the site and jacked into the main terminal.
You're going to blow up this entire island.
Won't that make things harder for you?
There's no room for half measures.
The weak exist to serve the strong.
Enough talk. Bring me the Amber.
I've arranged a way for you to get back to the island.
OK, Luis. What was it that you said again?
You should have known by now, Wesker.
I don't always play by your rules.

Oh, blessings unto him and
the sweet mercy they bring.
Exult all—and let it be so!
This is gonna be hard to explain at customs.
Someone is coming to pick you up.
I trust everything is fine on your end too, Leon.

You have forsaken the Holy Body...
the great gift...to become one with us.
I'm getting sick of your shit!
I'll give you a holy body!
What the hell are you doing?
Luis and I had an arrangement.
Don't worry, I'll take good care of it.

I think we both know this is where
we go our separate ways.
What are you planning to do with this?
I do not pay you to ask questions.
All you need to know is a new dawn is breaking.
A hundred will give their lives so that just one may live.
So, we're talking millions of casualties.
This is Control. You're flying off course. Report.
This is Control. You're flying off course. Report!
This is Control! You're flying off course! Report!

You rescued Luis, and now he will lead you to the Amber. Follow him.
The Black Robe is a formidable enemy, but many of its attacks can be parried or evaded. Don't take your eyes off it.
You need to escape the castle. Avoid combat as much as possible and take out the enemies quietly.
Once spotted by the enemy, the catapults will start flinging fireballs. If this happens, find a way to destroy them.
It's dangerous up ahead. Avoid combat and find a way to get around the enemy as you continue forward.
Luis didn't show up at the meeting place, but maybe you can find a clue on his location at Méndez's house.
The Black Robe made a sudden appearance. It may grab you if it gets too close, so keep your distance when fighting.
Luis didn't show up at the meeting place, but maybe you can find a clue on his location at Méndez's house.
There must be a clue on Luis's whereabouts somewhere. Search every room.
You know where Luis is being held. Check the location of the abandoned factory on your map and make your way there quickly.
If you observe your surroundings closely, you may find Luis's trail.
Many enemies are between you and the villa. It might be a good idea to keep your distance and avoid fighting.
Bullets won't stop Méndez. It's better to use the grapple gun to escape from him.
There's no telling what could be waiting for you in the abandoned factory. Make sure to get ready for a fight before you enter.
The villa where Luis is waiting is not far. However, the route there has changed since last time.
You're vulnerable while on the ground. Get on top of the buildings and aim for the giant's weak points.
In order to suppress the parasite in Ada's body, Luis needs the medicine he developed. Follow him.
Go after Luis in the burning laboratory. He won't last long among the flames.
In order to suppress the parasite in Ada's body, Luis needs the medicine he developed. Follow him.
The locations of the suppressant ingredients are marked on your map. Make sure to read the file titled Suppressant Ingredients too.
The red-robed zealot has stolen the stone that unlocks the door. Track him down and get it.
There's only one ingredient left. Search for the blue butterfly in the collection room accessible from the castle battlements.
Luis has the Amber. Follow his trail and meet up with him.
You can't continue through the waterway without draining the water first. There must be a way to do it.
You can hear the roars of the Black Robe. Prepare for battle before ending things once and for all.
Pesanta has a variety of attacks. Identify the signs of attack, wait for an opening, and prepare to counterattack.
Meet up with Luis and get the Amber.
Krauser has the Amber and you need to go after him. There are some obstacles in your way though, so observe your surroundings and give chase.
Krauser's heading out into the sea. Let's see what his next move is.
A large number of enemies are guarding the way to the comms facility. Reduce their numbers by taking out as many as possible stealthily.
You need to open the shutter to progress. Find something that will open it.
The enemy weapons along the defensive line that guards the comms facility are very powerful. Don't get hit.
You're nearly at the main terminal. Don't worry about the enemies and focus on making your way there.
There's nothing left to do at the comms facility now. Head for the newly opened way out.
The final battle against Saddler lies just up ahead. Take this last opportunity to prepare and upgrade your equipment.
Saddler launches many powerful attacks. Use the terrain to move around and find an opening to perform a counterattack.
The bombs on the island are about to go off. If you don't make it in time, it's over. You better hurry.
The bombs on the island are about to go off. If you don't make it in time, it's over. You better hurry.
The bombs on the island are about to go off. If you don't make it in time, it's over. You better hurry.

Fall, 2004
Ada Wong has infiltrated a menacing castle in rural Europe. Her mission is to retrieve an item of great importance to her client. But when her inside contact gets imprisoned, it's up to Ada to rescue him...before it's too late.

Ada's daring rescue of Luis is cut short by the Black Robe. They are forced to part ways, but not before Luis tells Ada to meet him at the church.

He better have the Amber when she does...

Luis didn't show up at the church...
Ada makes her way to the village chief's manor to look for him but instead encounters Leon, and he's in trouble. Ada saves him, but she needs to keep a low profile for now. Her mission comes first, after all.

Luis didn't show up at the church...
Ada makes her way to the village chief's manor to look for him but instead encounters Leon, and he's in trouble. Ada saves him, but she needs to keep a low profile for now. Her mission comes first, after all.

While searching for Luis, Ada becomes dizzy before passing out. When she wakes up, she comes face-to-face with Wesker himself, and he isn't pleased. Ada follows his orders and reunites with Luis, but the Amber is still in the castle. The two must venture there again to retrieve it...

"Because—you too are infected."
Luis was able to make the suppressant with the ingredients Ada accumulated. He quickly administers it to Ada, but the Black Robe is approaching and the medicine is slow to take effect...

"A bad guy...Krauser...Just stole the Amber."
As Ada chases after the man who just killed Luis, she runs into Leon once again. Determined to finish their missions, the two make their way to the island—the cult's stronghold.

Saddler possesses the Amber and Wesker has set his plan to destroy the island in motion. As the bombs count down, Ada returns to pursuing Saddler all the while wondering how this mission will play out.

The grapple gun allows you to zoom up to advantageous
areas or discover useful items.

Keep a lookout for places where you can use it.

You can attack some staggered enemies from afar by
using the grapple gun to move closer to them.

The I.R.I.S. device equipped in Ada's eye allows her
to see various things almost invisible to the naked eye.

Use it to find clues and complete your mission.

You can create various kinds of ammo by combining
resources and gunpowder.

Obtaining new crafting recipes will increase the types
of items and ammo that you can create.

You can change your attaché case or swap out charms via
the Customize Case menu at any typewriter.

Cases and charms each have their own special effects.

Ada's knife can be repaired by the Merchant
if it is broken. It can also be upgraded to increase
its durability, making it harder to break.

Melee attacks can be used on staggered enemies. If others
are nearby, they will also be knocked back at the same time.

You can then deliver a fatal attack on the struck enemy
with a knife, depending on their position.

You can't use typewriters while speaking through comms
or when enemies are nearby.

The blue papers that you find scattered around the area
are Request Notes. By picking one up, you will accept
a request. The details of accepted requests can be viewed
in the Files menu.

Once you've completed a request, head to the Merchant
to receive spinels as a reward.

If your attaché case is full, you can rearrange things in
the Items menu to make room for more items.
Using consumables or crafting items can also create
more space in your inventory.

Attacking while your knife is readied will deliver
quick forward thrusts.

If you have a knife, you will be able to quickly escape
from an enemy in most circumstances.

However, the knife's durability will be greatly reduced.

If you sneak behind an enemy when you have
a knife, you can take them out in a single move
without making any noise.

Some treasures can be sold at a higher price when fitted
with certain gemstones.

View the treasures you've collected in the Key Items &
Treasures menu.

If you have a knife, some enemy attacks can be
parried by performing the action just before the hit lands.

Time it right and the enemy will be staggered, giving you
a chance to attack.

The map isn't just for figuring out where you are.
It's also great for seeing where your objectives are
or locating unclaimed items.

Treasure maps will point out the locations of
treasure on your map.

You can restore health using herbs or first aid sprays.
You can also craft more effective recovery items by
combining specific herbs in the Items menu.

You can set a weapon to a shortcut by selecting
the weapon in the Items menu.

Up to eight weapons can be assigned at once.

You can temporarily deposit your equipment via
the Storage menu at any typewriter.

Stash away things like bulky weapons to make
space for other items in your attaché case.

When you see a typewriter, remember that saving is free,
so save often and save a life.

Key items that no longer serve a purpose can be sold
to the Merchant.

You can change the quick turn button or turn the action off
in the Options menu.

Shooting a weapon while the reticle is zoomed in will
increase the stagger and critical hit rate on enemies.

Moving while in the crouched position can help you
avoid enemy detection.

Most weapons can be upgraded by the Merchant.
If you keep running into difficulty during combat,
consider upgrading your weapons to give yourself
some more firepower.
Spinels can be traded in to the Merchant for special items.

You can view the contents of documents and comms
that you've received via the Files menu.

They may contain some important information.

You can choose whether the level of scope
magnification stays the same or resets after
you stop aiming in the Options menu.

You can change the game's difficulty level from
Standard to Assisted in the game over screen.

Keep your distance from the Black Robe while attacking.
Its claw attacks can be parried with a knife.

Hitting the phantom enemies with any attack will cause
them to disappear. Parrying will also have the same effect.

The real Black Robe's eyes will shine red just before
it attacks. Keep this in mind as you fight among
all the fake, phantom ones.

Try to avoid the Black Robe's sweeping spear attacks with
well-timed evade maneuvers. Thrust attacks can be dodged
by moving out of the way or parrying.

Stay alert when the Black Robe vanishes; this is a sign
that it is drawing closer to you to launch an attack.
Keep moving to put distance between you and the enemy.

The phantom enemies will disappear when shot, but it's best
to conserve your ammo for when you are fighting the real one.

The real Black Robe's eyes will shine red just before
it attacks. Keep this in mind as you fight among
all the fake, phantom ones.
Keep an eye out for useful items hidden in the fog.

It's hard to aim for the plaga on the giant's back while
on the ground. Zip up to the top of the buildings and
take aim from above the monster instead.

It's hard to target the giant's weak point when it's moving
around, but it will be open before and after it attacks.
Take aim during these times.

You can sometimes find useful items among the rubble after
the giant has destroyed a building. Keep a lookout for them
as you dodge the giant's attacks.
The Black Robe's True Form: Tail

Be careful when the monster thrusts its tail into the ground.
An attack is coming, and you should focus on evading it.
The Black Robe's True Form: Projectiles

The fleshy spikes stuck in the ground will cause damage
if you are too close when they burst. Get rid of them with
attacks or wait for them to burst from a safe distance.
The Black Robe's True Form: Movements

Evade the monster when it is frantically moving around
and counterattack when you are at a safe distance.
The Black Robe's True Form: Weaknesses

The monster has weak points on various parts of its body.
Aim for them when the opportunity presents itself.
The Black Robe's True Form: Grenades

Hand grenades are effective when the monster is crawling
around on the ground and covering its weak points.

Saddler can use his tentacles to perform wide-ranging
attacks. Don't let your guard down, even if you are far away.

Saddler can send the bullets you shoot at him back at you.
Get behind some cover when he does.

If you dodge Saddler's rush attacks by using the grapple
gun, it will give you the opportunity to attack him.

Approach a kneeling enemy from behind to perform
a powerful attack.
Cannons are effective at taking out catapults.

Don't blindly run into the enemy's defenses.
Carefully observe your surrounds to find useful
things to give you an edge.

Some enemy attacks such as grapples can be
dodged by crouching.

The villagers will calmly make their way to the church
when the bell is rung—as long as they are not attacked.

If you stop moving, the walkway will collapse and you
will fall to your death. Move quickly and make your
way to a more stable area.

Turning the handle will stop steam from leaking out.
Make sure you put distance between yourself and the enemy
so you have enough time to turn it.
Run through the flames and get to Luis before he dies.

Shoot the gongs with the same symbols as the gates
to open them and allow you to escape.

You'll need to take the Blue Moonstone from the red-robed
zealot if you want to make your way out of the courtyard.

Pick it up after you defeat him.

The longer you leave the red-robed zealot alone,
the more enemy reinforcements will come to his aid.
Take him out first and then deal with the rest.

Keep your eyes peeled for hidden enemies that cling
to the walls. If you spot one, take it out before it stirs.

There are some enemies that lurk in the water,
so keep a lookout for any ripples on the water's surface.

Move under the pounding rocks as they start to rise.
If you time it right, you can also lure pursuing enemies
underneath them as they drop.

Using a weapon with the biosensor scope mounted onto it
will give you the ability to accurately target the parasites
inside these enemies.

If you don't have one, you can purchase it from the Merchant.

When you spot an enemy, switch to an appropriate weapon
and take them out quickly before more enemies come.

Take out enemies from a distance before you get on the lift.
It'll make the battle easier for you.

Take cover from the pillbox machine guns and try to move
when their laser sights are pointing away from you.

This enemy won't be affected by any of your attacks.
It's just better to run away.

Watch the lasers carefully and look for gaps between
them where you can slip through.

These lasers will kill you instantly when touched.
Stay focused and evade them at all costs.

The enemies wielding rocket launchers cannot be ignored.
As soon as you see their laser sights, deal with them.

The laser traps cannot be deactivated, but they can
be destroyed by safely shooting them from a distance.

You don't have much time before the bombs on the island
start going off. Put all your skills to the test and fight
through the hordes of enemies.

Data Processing in Resident Evil Village

We, Capcom Co., Ltd. (“Capcom”), will collect and process your personal data according to our Privacy Policy upon your usage of Resident Evil Village (“Game”). 
Privacy Policy (https://www.capcom.co.jp/privacy/game/)

This Game also provides you a function to share your game-play data with the RESIDENT EVIL.NET service (“RE NET”) (https://www.residentevil.net) operated by Capcom. 

RE NET is a free interlocking web service support the Resident Evil series, providing features which allows you to view various data such as;
- world statistics based on enormous play data from players all over the world;
- detailed play data; and
- ranking 

Your consent to share your gameplay data with the RE NET is optional, and you may freely decide whether to give your consent.  Your gameplay experience will not be affected by the denial of the consent.

Capcom will collect the following personal data with your consent for the following purposes:

Collected information:
(a)  Identifying informationIdentification data provided by the platform providers;
(b)  In-game setting information;
(c)  Gameplay data (including region information); and,
(d)  Logs of in-game communication on the network connection; and,

Purpose of use:
- To enable you to use the services related to this Game on the RE NET website;
- To better understand the Capcom’s users and utilize the findings for product development and marketing purposes of Capcom’s products; and,
- To create statistical data for utilization and publication. 


In relation to the RE NET, your personal data will be sent and stored on the server in Japan, managed by Capcom and/or the server in Japan and/or U.S.A of the cloud service providers contracted by Capcom, regardless of your country of residence.
If your data is transferred outside the European Economic Area (EEA) for storage and processing of the data, Capcom will comply with applicable data protection laws, including GDPR.

You may withdraw your consent at any time on “RE NET” from the “Options” screen which will not affect the legitimate process of the data transmitted to Capcom prior to the withdrawal of your consent, and such data will remain accessible on the RE NET website.

Please be noted that, in order to use the RE NET website, you need to consent to the RE NET Terms of Use as well as its Privacy Policy provided separately.

—So, basically, this "suppressant" can

—Initial symptoms include mild abdominal pain

The results of ■■■'s physical examination showed
that his body had become infested with a plaga.
(Likely during one of his experiments with it.)

Under the supervision of lead researcher Luis
Serra, an attempt was made to purge the parasite
using a form of experimental radiation therapy.

16 minutes into the procedure, ■■■ showed signs
of severe shock and we were forced to stop. Soon
after, he was pronounced dead.

The device uses external beam radiation to "burn"
the parasite from outside the body, similar to a
linear accelerator used in treating cancer. The
pain is tremendous and its use could prove fatal.

The post-mortem autopsy has confirmed that the
parasite was successfully destroyed.

However, in lieu of these results, we have
determined that the device requires further
work and should not progress beyond the stage of
trial operation. Attached is the irradiation
device manual for reference.

Dicrocoelium
Once the larvae of this parasite migrate to the
ant's esophagus, they alter the behavior of the
ant. When the temperature drops in the evening,
during peak grazing hours, the infected ant climbs
to the top of a plant and clamps onto a leaf using
its mandible with the intention of being eaten.

Galactosomum
The larvae of this parasite make their home inside
the brain of a fish such as the yellowtail and the
parrot bass. Once infected, the fish makes its
way up to the water's surface, where it will
swim until eaten by seabirds.

Leucochloridium
This parasite's sporocysts develop in the snail's
eye stalks, where they pulsate like worms.
They alter the snail's behavior and force it to
move to the top of a plant to make it more visible
to birds. Once eaten by a bird, the parasite will
complete its metamorphosis into an adult.

Hear the signal echo through the mountains.
Rocks become gravel and the castle walls crumble.

Behold the crimson shade of the night sky.
A river of tainted blood befouls the sea.

Sacrifice your life and the blood of your enemy.
Atone for your ancient sins.

The Salazar family line has come to an end.

In order to cure Ramón's sickness, his mother
Catalina invited the devil into their home.

Inscribed is a brief history of the members
that solidified this prestigious bloodline.

1st Gen. Count Gregorio, The Conqueror
Gregorio led his men to eradicate the evil that
befell the castle. Recognized for his bravery, he
was awarded the title of Count and entrusted to
keep the demons sealed for generations to come.

2nd Gen. Count Hipólito, The Sealer
With great effort, Hipólito sealed away the plague
of demons that emerged from the depths of the
earth. He succumbed to wounds sustained in battle.

3rd Gen. Count Gregorio, The Architect
Driven by irrational paranoia, Gregorio squandered
his vast fortune on excessive castle defenses
and strange, elaborate contraptions.

4th Gen. Count José Alonso, The Tranquil
Alonso endeavored to restore the family's honor.

5th Gen. Count Alejandro, The Lavish
Playful at heart, Alejandro had a courtyard and
ballroom erected before his untimely death.

6th Gen. Countess María Isabel, The Lady
Alejandro's widow. Countess Isabel had a long
reign before her death at age 90.

7th Gen. Count Diego, The Severe
Similar to his predecessor, Diego was exceedingly
strict. He was murdered at the hands of a devil.

8th Gen. Count Ramón
His illness should have taken him.

Another one dead.
How long has it been since I was thrown down here?

The meager scraps of food provided in the
beginning are gone and they don't give us more.

The pains of hunger and thirst are unbearable.
Most have resorted to drinking the black water.

The first to turn was Herminio.

He was so weak that he couldn't even walk,
but then suddenly became mad.

By the time his rampage ended, two were dead.
I think we shouldn't drink that dark liquid.

Dear Abelardo has also passed, though he fought
until the very end.

The only thing I can do now is honor the bodies
and pray that their souls find peace.

Oh Lord, why do you test us so?

May, nine years since my awakening—

I await the trial with great anticipation.

The next time I awaken, it will be as a

I, Isidro Uriarte Talavera, make this vow.

I will surpass the limitations of man and

I will find the heretics and serve as their

Date: October 11
Today was the worst day of my life.
It's my daughter's 5th birthday, but here
I am stuck on a mangey boat heading out
to some backcountry dump.

If it weren't for the pay, no one would be willing
to work out in the middle of nowhere.

Date: October 19
Those in the castle are always reminding us
to take care during the excavation, but a few
workers collapsed after inhaling some dust.
There's something going on here that they're
not telling us. There are too many secrets.

I've started coughing too. I should sleep.

Something's really wrong with me. I threw up

I can barely move.

Shit, I never should have come here.
I came for the money, but instead I am the
one paying the price. I'm a terrible father.

I'm so sorry, sweetheart. You deserve better.

At last, I have created new life.
I call it "Regenerador."

Its metabolic capacity is incredible. Unless all
the <COL FILE>parasites residing within the organism</COL> are
destroyed, its tissue can <COL FILE>regenerate indefinitely</COL>.

Date: April 10

Upon examining the body with a <COL FILE>biosensor scope</COL>,
I was able to confirm that the parasites behave
like vital organs for the host, almost as though
it has multiple hearts!

This new creation of mine is essentially immortal.
Surely, even Dr. Frankenstein himself would want
to shake my hand in admiration!

Date: April 13

I shared the news of my achievement with that
pretentious bastard colleague of mine. His face
went white! Then, he started scribbling something
in his notebook. I thought he'd be impressed,
but instead he actually had the nerve to warn me
of the so-called dangers.

He's a fool. I have everything under control.

Date:

The subject went wild and escaped from
its cryogenic tank.



I was the real fool.

We were imprisoned without warning.

One by one we are taken to the next room.
I do not know what happens there.
They just took Anabel. I am probably next.

I've got to think! Need to get my head straight!

All who are infected with the plaga will be
at the mercy of Lord Saddler.
If he commands it, they will work themselves
to death with a smile on their face.

Adversely, the host becomes so simple-minded that
they're basically useless for any complex task.

However, we succeeded in developing the new,
superior species of plaga. It has no special
variability, but the host's cognitive
functions are not diminished.

It seems like they plan to administer this new
species to the girl. It's clearly important that
she maintains her intelligence after infection.

All tests were successful and plans for
mass production are moving forward.
The project is a complete success!

But I've been imprisoned.

And preparations to inject me with the superior
species are underway in the next room.

Anabel is not herself anymore.
The smile has been wiped completely from her face.

Writing is the only thing that keeps me sane now.
Not that anyone will ever read this.

Dearest Lord Saddler,

I am overjoyed to report wonderful news!
Production of the superior species of las plagas
is officially underway.

If all goes accordingly, rest assured that we will
reach our ultimate goal.

The plaga is a truly magnificent organism.
It has the capacity to live in any vertebrate,
be it human, dog, or even crow.
There is no other parasite like it on earth.

The superior species is particularly impressive,
as it can assimilate with a host without causing
any damage to the brain.

No one can oppose the strength
of your dominance, my lord.

On the contrary, who would resist
once they experience the utter joy that
accompanies the absence of free will?

I am living proof.
How ignorant I once was.

In a few days, I will have finished
administrating the plaga to all the high-ranking
researchers, and then they too shall know.

And when your plan is complete, the whole
world shall know!

<RIGHT>Anabel García Escudero, Head Researcher</RIGHT>

Per your request, redevelopment of the island

By the time we are finished,

None will be able to resist our power.

<RIGHT>Jack Krauser</RIGHT>

Operation Javier.
Few people have heard the name, even within
the highest ranks of the US government.
And little wonder too, the operation was not
made public. It was conducted in secret,
and then buried.

The reason being—it was too inhumane.

It all started back in 2002 when a small unit
of US special forces was sent to infiltrate
an area of South America.

Their mission was to eradicate the drug cartels.
The whole operation took several years to prepare
for and only the most elite soldiers were selected
to participate.

I don't know if the mission was a failure or not,
but I do know the fate of those elite soldiers
once it was over.

Apparently, the entire unit was wiped out except
for the commanding officer, Major █████.
And not by the cartels, but by the US.

It shouldn't have been difficult to extract a
single stranded unit. All it would have taken
was a single helicopter. But for some reason,
the military didn't act.

Rumors say that the decision was the outcome
of a power struggle among the top brass,
others say it was a directive from the former
president himself. But we may never know the
truth since it was all covered up.

But I'm certain of one thing.

The US government let those people die.
Brave, young people who dedicated their
lives to protect their country.

I want to expose this crime, not because it's
my responsibility as a reporter, but because
it's my duty as a fellow American.

Note 1:
This document concerns Operation Javier
and was written by an American journalist
named ██ ████.

Note 2:
This article will never be published.
 ████ has already been taken care of.

Subject:  Re: Re: Regarding our arrangement
From: Luis

Relax, I haven't forgotten.
And don't worry about the Amber.
I'll figure something out.

Think you can pick me up a pack of smokes
on the way? Any brand is fine.

This sample, which I've come to call "the Amber,"
was just sitting in the storeroom collecting dust.

We used to have ample specimens for
experimentation in the past, so it makes sense
that this one was overlooked.

In fact, the only reason I brought it back to my
lab was because of its peculiar shape.

After a basic analysis, I've changed my mind.

The Amber possesses a very unique quality.
Although small and in a suspended state,
it contains the same organ found in the
"dominant species", which we've only seen
in Saddler himself.

When fully developed, the Amber may rival, or
perhaps even surpass, Saddler's power.

Unfortunately, the Amber was confiscated by
Saddler before I could make any further progress
in my research. He may be onto me.

I need to get my hands on that sample again and
escape in order to continue my research elsewhere.
It's the only way to counter Saddler.

Of course, I don't think I can trust this outside
group either, but I've already come this far.

Hopefully I can sweet talk my way out
of this one too.

I'll have to. For the world's sake.

Do not be fooled into thinking that las plagas are
merely tools for creating powerful bioweapons.
Their true value lies in their ability to control.

No matter how hostile the subject, a single
injection can turn anyone into a faithful servant.
Who needs spies when you can turn yesterday's
enemy into today's ally?

Controlling just one insider can bring an entire
organization—an entire country—to its knees.

Mass production of the superior species has made
this possible. We have empowered Saddler.

It is clear what he intends to do next.

Can you imagine if Saddler had that much control?

Six billion loyal servants at his sole command.
There would be no opposition, no war.

Maybe for the first time in human history,
the world would know peace.

But I know how Saddler and the others have
oppressed the people of this island for
generations. I know how he treats them.

That's no way to live.
And because of that, I won't let it happen.

There are two ways to eradicate las plagas:
antigen injection and surgery.

If the parasite has not hatched yet,
it can be treated by administering antigen
directly into the body.

Once it has hatched however, there's not much
that can be done besides slow its growth.

With surgery, the plaga can be targeted and
killed using a certain wavelength of radiation.

But this is not without its risks.
If the parasite has attached itself to the host's
nervous system, the host will experience
excruciating pain. And there is no effective
anesthesia for this kind of procedure.

Surgical removal carries considerable risks,
even before the parasite has fully developed.

Once fully grown however, it is too late:
removing the parasite would kill the host.

But considering what will happen to them,
death may be a mercy.

It'll be easy to spot; it's not like normal dogs.

They're a damn eyesore! Someone get them

It is an heirloom of our family and cannot become

Those annoying <COL FILE>blue medallions</COL> are a blemish

Leon: Roost, this is Condor One.

Hunnigan: Hunnigan here. What's your sitrep?

Leon: The president's daughter—Baby Eagle.
It's likely she's in this village.

Hunnigan: Our intel was correct, then. Well done.

Leon: Need a location on a nearby lake.
She may have been taken there.

Hunnigan: Copy that. I'll see what I can find.

Leon: Hurry up. Something's happened
to the people here. My escorts are—

Leon: Gotta go. Talk later.

Hunnigan: Roost to Condor One. I've identified
a route to the lake. Look for a large windmill.
There's a path on the far side of it.

Leon: Windmill. Copy that.

Hunnigan: And be careful. Roost out.

Leon: Condor One to Roost. I've located Baby Eagle.
It sounds like she's being kept in some church.

Hunnigan: Great! That's good news.

Leon: I heard it from this guy I met.
Said his name is Luis Serra.

Leon: There was something fishy about him.
I need you run a background check.

Hunnigan: Wilco, Condor One. I'll see what
I can find. In the meantime, make your way
to that church.

Leon: Right. I'm probably due for confession
anyway. Condor One out.

Hunnigan: Roost to Condor One.
I've got that intel you requested on Luis Serra.
It seems he used to be a researcher for Umbrella.

Leon: Umbrella? I should've
left him in that bag to rot.

Hunnigan: I'm sending you the details.
Take a look, but Baby Eagle is your priority.

Leon: Copy that. Making my way to the church.
Condor One out.

Leon: Condor One to Roost.
The church is sealed up.

Hunnigan: And Baby Eagle?

Leon: Negative, nothing yet. But they
sure do have this place locked up tight.

Hunnigan: I see. I can think of one
reason they'd want to do so.

Leon: Oh she's here, that's for sure.
I'll find a way in. Condor One out.

Leon: Condor One to Roost. Do you read me?

Hunnigan: Condor One!? You've been radio
silent for three hours. Are you all right?

Leon: Yeah... I'm fine. Won't let it happen again.

Hunnigan: And the church?

Leon: Still looking for whatever "key" I need.

Hunnigan: Copy that. I'm glad you're OK.
Roost out.

Leon: Condor One to Roost.
I found the key to the church.

Hunnigan: Copy that.
Now, go get Baby Eagle.

Leon: Right, no time to chat.
I'm going in. Condor One out.

Leon: Roost, I've secured Baby Eagle.

Hunnigan: Copy that. Is she OK?

Leon: Affirmative.

Hunnigan: Well done, Condor One.
I'll dispatch a chopper ASAP.

Hunnigan: I'm sending you the coordinates for
the extraction point. Make your way there.
And don't let anything happen to Baby Eagle.

Leon: Copy that.

Hunnigan: Hurry, the weather is getting worse.
Roost out.

Hunnigan: This is Roost.
I've got some bad news, Condor One.
With the weather like this, the chopper can't make
its approach. Can you stand by until it clears?

Leon: Negative. Too dangerous.
We're gonna get out of here and
find someplace safe.

Hunnigan: I'm sorry,
I wish I could do more to help.

Leon: Don't worry about it. We'll swim
home if we have to. Condor One out.

Luis: Hola. Luis here. You guys still around?

Leon: Well, I wanted to go home,
but Ashley just had to see this castle first.

Luis: Perfect, because I have a present
I want to give you.

Luis: Medicine that will help to suppress
the progress of your...problem.

Leon: Where do we go?

Luis: Let's see... Come to the courtyard inside
of the castle. We can meet up there. ¡Ciao!

Leon: Roost, come in! Things went to shit.
We took refuge inside a castle, but I've just
been separated from Baby Eagle.

Hunnigan: Say [static] —ding you.

Leon: Roost? You're breaking up. Do you read me?

Leon: Luis, where are you?

Luis: Sorry I, uh, I screwed up.
Come to my rescue, Prince Charming.

Leon: I'll show you charming, pal!

Luis: C'mon. I'm in the ballroom past
the courtyard. Don't be late to the dance!

Ada: Leon. Changed your mind yet?

Leon: Ada?

Ada: Assuming you haven't,
I've got a tip for you.

Ada: Seems like something big is
about to go down in the throne room.

Babysitting's tough, huh.

Ada: Leon. There's only time to say this once,
so listen up. They took your friend to the top
of the clock tower.

If you hurry, you might get
there before she turns into one of them.

Leon: Ah, so you aren't heartless after all.
I guess I should be...thankful?

Ada: Yeah, you should.

Leon: Ada, come in.
There's a lab where we can remove the parasites.
Had a crazy hunch that you'd know where it is.

Ada: Their most important facilities are housed
in their sanctuary at the top of the mountain.
That's where I'd look.

Leon: Huh. Ada the encyclopedia.

Ada: Happy to help. Now you owe me.

The entrance is locked. Looks like you'll have to find another way out.
Seems there's a lake not too far away. Might be a good idea to check your map.
It's easy to get surrounded when facing many enemies, but the trick to avoiding this is to keep moving. This tactic may also lead you to useful items.
The lake can be accessed via the cliffside path beyond the windmill. Be sure to carefully look over the map so that you don't miss anything.
Things may get tough from here on out. Make sure you've got the weapons and upgrades you need before continuing on.
The target is being held inside the church on the hill. You've got the key, now all you have to do is get there.
You need a boat to cross the lake. If you look around the lakeside, you might be able to find one you can use.
You're as good as dead if the boat gets smashed up. Steer left and right to avoid obstacles.
Rescuing and keeping the target safe is your top priority, but you'll have to get the key to the church first.
The locations depicted in the mural have been marked on your map. Use them to aid your search.
You got what you need, but the lake's a big place. A treasure map can help you find any valuables you might have missed along the way.
The enemy becomes more aggressive at night. Make sure you're fully prepared before heading back to the church.
Despite the enemy's size, attacks to the face are effective. Consecutive attacks will cause its weak spot to appear on its back.
The target must be somewhere in the church. Best to explore every nook and cranny.
The enemy has swarmed around the church entrance. There's got to be another way out.
The enemy will try to forcibly carry Ashley away. Keep her out of harm's way by using suitable commands.
Keep moving to avoid being surrounded. Boarding up windows will also prevent enemies from getting in.
Protecting Ashley against large groups can be tricky. Maybe you can find a good place for her to hide while you deal with the threat.

Your weapons will do little to stop the big guy in black from pursuing Ashley.
Your only hope is to run away.
Méndez's weak point is located on his back. It might be easier to target it from an elevated position.
Going back the way you came is no longer an option. Your only choice is to press forward and fight to keep Ashley safe.
The castle is heavily fortified. Find a way to take out the defenses.
The enemy down in the dungeons is sensitive to sound. Crouch to move more quietly while you search the area.
Numerous threats await you along the way to the courtyard. Stay vigilant to prevent Ashley from being taken.
After Ashley disappears into the courtyard alone, you'll have to make a large detour in order to reunite with her.
It's easy to lose your way in the middle of the castle. Make sure to check the map to find your bearings.
Living armor enemies are vulnerable to blue flames. Shine your lantern to immobilize them.
Flying enemies will swarm and attack from all directions. Lead them into a confined space to limit their movements.
Terrifying monsters skulk around in the water. Watch for the glow of their eyes right before they attack.
Ramón's right hand is vulnerable to the cold. Freezing it will make your attacks more effective.
Luis can take care of himself in a fight, so you don't need to protect him. Focus on the enemies that threaten you.
Stagger a giant while it's standing over the hatch in the center of the room to easily drop it into the blast furnace below.
Minecarts cannot be stopped once they've started moving. Shoot the track switches to change the cart's route and avoid danger.
This battle is best fought head-on with a knife. Try to parry your opponent's attacks and then aim to deal damage while he's still vulnerable.
Once you start your final assault on the castle, there's no going back. Look over the map and double-check that you haven't missed anything.
The zealots have a nasty surprise waiting for you in the clock tower. Proceed with caution.
Before settling the score with Ramón, make sure your equipment is up to snuff. Fully upgrade your weapons if you can afford it.
Ramón's true body is hidden inside the mouth of that huge monstrosity. Wait for an opening to attack it while doing your best to evade his attacks.
Krauser has taken Ashley. You've no choice but to go after them.
The soldiers use more deadly weapons. Be especially wary of those with rocket launchers.
These enemies will regenerate from normal attacks. It may be better to play it safe and run away until you can get your hands on the biosensor scope.
Ashley is being held captive, but she needs to be administered the suppressant before it's too late.
The equipment needed to remove the parasite is being kept in the cult's sanctuary at the top of the mountain.
With Ashley inside the crane, it's imperative that you protect it at all costs.
Make sure you've taken care of everything you need to before progressing further.
Krauser is quick and elusive. Keep your guard up and be especially careful when you lose sight of him.
Learn your opponent's attacks to know when to parry, dodge, or run away. And be careful not to get knocked off the ledge—the fall will kill you.
The helicopter will lay down a barrage of covering fire as you advance through the area, so try to draw the enemy out into the open.
The anti-aircraft gun is protected by armor on its sides. See if you can find a higher position to take aim at it from above.
Take control of a turret gun from the enemy for some heavy-duty firepower.
Luis's laboratory is in the sanctuary located at the top of the mountain. There, you'll find a way to eradicate the parasite.
The final battle against Saddler lies just up ahead. Take this last opportunity to prepare and upgrade your equipment.
Try to stay out of reach of Saddler's tentacles while you wait for an opening to attack. When that opening comes, stab at his vital points.
Time to make your escape, courtesy of Ada Wong.

Fall, 2004
After the president's daughter is kidnapped, US agent Leon S. Kennedy follows eyewitness reports leading him to a small European village. With the weight of that fateful night in Raccoon City on his shoulders, he sets out on his mission.
Ashley Graham's trail has lead Leon straight into the belly of the beast. He's in pursuit, but one wrong move could spell his end.

"Your blood has accepted the Gift."

With these ominous words, Leon's formidable attacker vanished. While trying not to think about the true meaning behind them, Leon continues on in his search for Ashley.

After coughing up blood, Leon suddenly loses consciousness. Something is lingering inside his body, silently eroding him from inside out.

He needs to find Ashley...before it's too late...
Leon finally manages to locate Ashley and set her free, but his relief is cut short as a mob of villagers has the area surrounded. He must protect Ashley at all costs and escape the village.

Ashley discovers that she is also infected with the parasite known as the plaga. But all is not lost, as Luis offers them hope.

With no choice, Leon comforts her as they continue on.
Leon and Ashley evade their attackers and make their way to a castle. However, they have no idea of the evil that lies in wait behind its walls.

After using Leon's own knife against him, Ashley ran off deeper into the castle. Something wasn't right with her; it was as if she was being controlled like a puppet.

Confused and concerned, Leon goes after her.

Leon is finally reunited with Ashley, but he finds her paralyzed with guilt for what she has done. After some words of comfort, Ashley collects herself and the two set off together to meet up with Luis.

After Leon is caught in a trap, it was Ashley's turn to save the day. But their joyous reunion is short-lived as she is captured by the enemy once again.

Leon heads farther into the castle to rescue her.
Having fallen into Ramón's trap, Leon finds himself deep below the castle where he runs into Luis. Now they must work together to reach the surface and rescue Ashley.

Leon discovers that Jack Krauser, his former mentor, was involved in Ashley's kidnapping. Krauser ruthlessly murders Luis, then disappears without a trace. Confused and angry, Leon hurries to find Ashley and fulfill Luis's last wish.

Ada Wong shows up out of nowhere again, but Leon wonders where her allegiance truly lies. Is she an ally, or is she just using him again? Regardless of Ada's intentions, Leon can now pursue Krauser and save Ashley thanks to her.
Leon reunites with Ashley on an isolated island controlled by the cult, but they're running out of time. The plaga parasites within them continue to grow at a horrific rate.

Although finally able to lay his complicated history with Krauser to rest, Leon can't afford to waste time being sentimental now. Saddler has taken control of Ashley and disappeared into the depths of the island.
Fighting the parasite for control of his own body, Leon uses his last remaining strength to get Ashley to the lab in desperate hope that Luis's legacy can still save them.

About the Settings for Sending Play Data

If the customer has given consent, Capcom Co., Ltd. (the Company) will collect the personal information below that is related to gameplay in Biohazard RE:4 (the Game) and use that information for the purposes below.

About collected information:
a. Information, such as your ID that is provided by us, your platform ID (user identification provided by a platform provider of games), and other information that identifies you as a player.
b. Information related to the operation environment of our games, such as information about your computer, device, software, etc. 
c. Information of the country or region where you play our games and information related to your activities within our games.
d. Log files and crash reports, and other similar information.  
e. Content of your inquiry.
f. Other information that we clearly specify prior to the collection of information.

Purpose of use:
・For creation and use of statistical data for the analysis of play status of the Game. Capcom will use the statistical data for various purposes, including but not limited to improving or adding new features to the Game, future game development, and promotional activities (including disclosure of the statistical data) by Capcom.
・For marketing purposes.

*Since we collect your Platform ID upon your playing of the Game, please acknowledge that in the event you play other Capcom games using the same Platform ID, your data collected upon playing the Game may be combined with your data collected upon playing other Capcom games and used for the purposes set forth herein.

Your data collected by Capcom will be sent and stored on the server in Japan, managed by Capcom and/or the server in Japan and/or U.S.A. of the cloud service providers contracted by Capcom, regardless of your country of residence.
Your consent to data processing for purposes set forth herein is not mandatory, and you can freely decide whether or not to give your consent. Your game play will not be affected even if you choose not to consent.  

You may withdraw your consent at any time from the Options menu; however, this will not affect lawfulness of processing of the data collected prior to withdrawal of your consent.

Matters we have not explained so far about Capcom’s processing of your personal data are stated in our Capcom Games Privacy Policy (Console and PC games) (URL:https://www.capcom.co.jp/privacy/game/). Please be sure to read the Capcom Games Privacy Policy (Console and PC games) before giving us your consent.

About the Settings for Sending Data to a CAPCOM ID

To customers who have already linked a CAPCOM ID:

In the Company’s account service CAPCOM ID, we are taking the initiatives for the purposes of accurately ascertaining customers’ needs and use trends and developing even better products and services.

If you consent, the Company will obtain, as your activity content as a CAPCOM ID member, information related to your gameplay for the Game.

If such acquisition will be conducted, the Company can do the following:
・When, in the future, campaigns or services intended for players of the Game will be provided to you in relation to the CAPCOM ID, the Company can use the CAPCOM ID to identify you. 
・In addition to being connected to the Company’s future service improvement and development of new content as a result of analysis through the CAPCOM ID, the Company will be able to ensure that the products and services that the Company proposes to you more appropriately match your needs.


Even if you do not provide consent, there will be no effects on gameplay.

You can withdraw your consent at any time from the Options menu. However, please note that this will not affect the Company’s lawful processing of data that was conducted before withdrawal.

You can take on tasks by collecting the Blue
Request Notes posted around different areas.

View the requests you've taken in the Files menu.

Weapons and items can be bought or sold to
the Merchant using Pesetas (ptas.). You can also
upgrade or repair your weapons and equipment.

Once you've completed a task received from
a Blue Request Note, you can claim the reward
by talking to the Merchant.

Certain materials such as resources, gunpowder,
and knives can be used to craft different items.

The types of items that you can craft can be
increased by obtaining new crafting recipes.

The enemy will try to grab Ashley and carry her
off. If Leon is too far away when this occurs,
they will get away, resulting in a game over.

If you cannot pick up an item because your
inventory is full, you can try moving things
around to make room via the Items menu.

You can also craft items to free up some space.

You can perform wide-sweeping slash attacks with <ICON SHOT>.

You can also deliver quick stab attacks with <ICON SHOT>
while holding <ICON PARRY>.

Ashley will become temporarily incapacitated
if she's attacked. She will die if she is attacked
again while in this state.

If you sneak behind an enemy when you have
a knife, you can take them out in a single move
without making any noise.

You can view the treasures you've collected
in the Key Items & Treasures menu.

Some treasures can be sold at a higher price
by fitting them with gemstones.

Switch between Tight and Loose formation with <ICON NPC_INSTRUCTION>.

Ashley will stick close behind Leon while in
Tight formation. This can be effective when
running past enemies.

Switch between Tight and Loose formation with <ICON NPC_INSTRUCTION>.

Ashley will hang back behind Leon while in
Loose formation. This can help her avoid
enemy attacks.

If you have a knife, you can parry an attack
with <ICON PARRY> when the prompt appears in the
bottom-right corner of the screen.

You can successfully parry even if you press
it before the prompt appears. Time it right
and the enemy will be staggered.

Charms can be swapped out via the Customize Case
menu at any typewriter.

If you become lost, you can check your current
position and objectives on the Map.

If you have a treasure map, you'll also be able
to see the locations of hidden valuables.

You can restore health using herbs or a first aid
spray. The effects of herbs can be enhanced by
combining them with other herbs.

Red herbs increase the amount of health recovered,
while yellow herbs increase your maximum health.

You can set a weapon to a shortcut by selecting
the weapon in the Items menu.

Up to eight weapons can be assigned at once:
two weapons on each of the four directions.

You can save your progress at any typewriter.

You can also swap out weapons in your inventory
via the Storage menu.

Key items that no longer serve a purpose can
be sold to the Merchant.

Melee attacks can be used on staggered enemies.
If others are nearby, they will also be knocked
back at the same time.

You can then deliver a fatal attack on the struck
enemy with a knife, depending on their position.

You can change your attaché case via the
Customize Case menu at any typewriter.

You can use three silver or gold tokens at
the token machine to win a random charm.

The more gold tokens you use, the greater
your chances of getting a rare charm.

The biosensor scope can be used
with any scope-compatible weapon.

Perform a quick turn to quickly face in the
opposite direction with <ICON QUICK_TURN_GUIDE>.

This action can also be turned off.

The quick turn action can be
turned on in the Options menu.

Discounts are only available during the chapters
they appear in.
